description: Real-world ocean life — fish, marine mammals, crustaceans, and seabirds.
creatures: Dolphin
A grinning, acrobatic swimmer that leaps from waves and clicks in rapid, intelligent conversation.
Whale
A vast, gentle giant whose mournful songs echo for miles through the deep ocean.
Sea Turtle
An ancient, shell-armored voyager that glides on ocean currents for thousands of miles.
Seahorse
A tiny, upright swimmer with a curled tail and bony armor that drifts among the kelp.
Jellyfish
A translucent, pulsing bell that trails stinging tentacles through the current like ghostly ribbons.
Starfish
A five-armed crawler that pries open shells with relentless grip and regrows lost limbs.
Crab
A hard-shelled scuttler with powerful pincers that sidesteps across sand and snaps at anything close.
Clownfish
A bright orange reef fish that hides among the stinging tentacles of its anemone home.
Pufferfish
A round little fish that balloons to twice its size and carries enough toxin to kill thirty humans.
Eel
A sinuous, slippery hunter with powerful jaws that lurks in crevices and strikes from the dark.
Stingray
A flat, winged glider that buries itself in sand and flicks a venomous barb at anything that steps on it.
Seal
A sleek, whiskered swimmer that basks on rocks and darts through water with effortless grace.
Lobster
A heavy-clawed crustacean in a hard shell that snaps with bone-cracking force and never stops growing.
Swordfish
A torpedo-shaped hunter that slashes through schools of fish with its razor-edged bill.
Narwhal
An arctic whale with a spiraling ivory tusk that pierces through sea ice.
Manta Ray
A vast, gliding ray that sweeps through the sea on wings wider than a boat.
Manatee
A gentle, lumbering sea cow that drifts through warm shallows grazing on seagrass.
Sea Otter
A playful, furry swimmer that floats on its back and cracks shellfish open on stones balanced on its belly.
Walrus
A tusked, blubbery giant that hauls itself onto ice floes and bellows challenges to rivals.
Barracuda
A silver streak of teeth and muscle that lunges from nowhere with terrifying speed.
Flying Fish
A small ocean fish that bursts from the waves and glides on outstretched fins to escape predators.
Anglerfish
A deep-sea nightmare with a gaping maw and a bioluminescent lure dangling in the darkness.
Hermit Crab
A soft-bodied scavenger that squeezes into borrowed shells and trades up as it grows.
Nautilus
An ancient, spiral-shelled drifter that jets through deep currents unchanged for millions of years.
Sea Lion
A barking, playful beast that porpoises through waves and hauls out on sunny rocks.
Beluga Whale
A ghostly white whale with a bulging forehead that chirps and clicks like an underwater songbird.
Orca
A sleek, black-and-white apex predator that hunts in coordinated family pods with chilling intelligence.
Porpoise
A small, blunt-nosed cetacean that zips through waves in quick, shy bursts.
Sea Snake
A banded, venomous reptile with a paddle tail that glides through warm ocean shallows.
Pelican
A large waterbird with a cavernous throat pouch that scoops fish in spectacular plunging dives.
